q: What does Nietzsche mean by the will to power? Answer using the connected corpus and quote it verbatim.
final:
I couldn’t retrieve a Nietzsche source passage from the connected corpus for “will to power.”

What I *was* able to verify from the search results is only that the Nietzsche hub note exists and that it is described as covering it:

- “Covers the will to power and the critique of self-preservation, perspectivism, the genealogy of morals (master and slave...)” from the note **Nietzsche — Beyond Good and Evil** at https://trip2g.com/en/hub/nietzsche

But the note itself did not return readable content through the available tool, so I can’t responsibly quote Nietzsche’s explanation verbatim from this corpus.

If you want, I can keep searching the corpus for a section that actually quotes or defines the “will to power,” and then answer strictly from that text.
